research_warning: Guided examples are diagnostic-only and not production encryption.

large_coefficient_validation.title: Large coefficient validation corpus
large_coefficient_validation.caveat: These are rational diagnostics over Q, not production finite-field ECC curves.

examples.title: Nonzero coefficient sanity check
examples.expected_result: Nonsingular sanity-check with nonzero a and b.
examples.why: Explains the input shape without showing a b=0 or singular-looking example.

examples.title: No rational 2-torsion
examples.why: Validates a negative 2-torsion diagnostic against SageMath.

examples.title: 32-bit-ish no obvious rational root
examples.why: Keeps the previous Research-scale coefficient pair but upgrades it to a SageMath-validated report.
examples.caveat: Rational diagnostic over Q, not production finite-field crypto.

examples.title: 128-bit-ish large a, small b
examples.why: Shows a large coefficient stress case with a simple constant term and validated report.
examples.caveat: Rational diagnostic over Q, not production finite-field crypto.

examples.title: Controlled large-discriminant stress
examples.expected_result: No rational 2-torsion; local Lutz-Nagell helper is size-guarded.
examples.why: Shows how large-discriminant examples stay explicit about local diagnostic bounds.
examples.caveat: Rational diagnostic over Q, not production finite-field crypto.
